title: aerides augustiana
intro: Aerides augustiana, also known as the August's Aerides, is a species of orchid native to the Philippines. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aerides augustiana include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are typically dried and used to make tea or infusions, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
